calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders Does 1 to 50 of case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk J Lee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Continued To Aug-05-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Mtn To Approve Prop 65 Settlement
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip Emmons, Esq., 925.287.6436, for Plaintiff Environmental Research Center; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER, Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Paula Shi #13358.

Mtn To Approve Prop 65 Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-24-2014 Continued To May-23-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement. Moving party filed a Supplemental Memorandum of Points & Authorities in Support of Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and for Entry of Consent Judgment as to Defendant Bodybuilding.Com LLC on April 22, 2014. The supplemental papers include a declaration and a new proposed Consent Judgment. This matter is continued to May 23, 2014 to permit the Attorney General to respond to the supplemental papers filed and served on April 22, 2014. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
